title: LLM Generation Request
description: Request object for LLM text generation containing prompt, model specification, and generation parameters
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries all inputs needed to invoke an LLM text generation cap: the prompt, the model to use, and any sampling or constraint parameters. A single request object lets callers express the full generation intent without needing multiple input ports.

## When to use
Pass this type to any cap that performs text generation, vocabulary inspection (`get_vocab`), or model information retrieval (`get_info`). For streaming responses the cap should produce a [LLM Text Stream](https://capdag.com/browse/media:llm-text-stream;ndjson); for batch responses it produces [Generated Text](https://capdag.com/browse/media:generated-text;textable;record).

## Notes
The `request_type` field defaults to `generate` when absent. Constraint fields (`grammar`, `json_schema`, `constraint`) are mutually exclusive in practice; implementers should apply the first one present. The `model_spec` value follows the same format described in [Model Spec](https://capdag.com/browse/media:model-spec;textable).

prompt.description: The input text prompt for generation

model_spec.description: Model specification (HuggingFace repo, local path, or alias)

json_schema.description: JSON schema constraint for structured output

constraint.description: Constraint specification (json_schema, regex, grammar, or tool_call)
